description: The Facilities Manager has reported that the air conditioning in Room 304 has failed. Move the 'Introduction to Biology' class section scheduled for Period 2 from 'Room 304' to the 'Science Lab' immediately. The Period 3 section of the same course meets later in the day when repairs will be finished, so do not change the room for Period 3. Log in using the admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin@123).
